groupings.title: Product Lifecycle
groupings.description: Skills for planning complete products from market research through support, growth, and operations.

groupings.title: Design & Product Craft
groupings.description: Skills for product taste, interface polish, and user-perceived quality.

groupings.title: Mobile Product Systems
groupings.description: Skills for mobile app monetization, retention, refunds, notifications, IAP, IAA, and rewards.

groupings.title: Pricing & Monetization
groupings.description: Skills for SaaS pricing, subscription packaging, trials, expansion, and revenue systems.

groupings.title: Distribution & Operations
groupings.description: Skills for store launch, OS integration, backup, restore, support, and product operations.

groupings.title: Agent Skill Operations
groupings.description: Skills for creating, curating, validating, and operating reusable agent skills.
